reason: Task PRD with D1-D7 decisions, 27-key Config Registry v1, AC1-AC13, and DoD
Cross-layer + code-reuse thinking guides — change touches runner/api/web/shared so cross-cutting reasoning matters
CONFIG_REGISTRY ships in @ainp/shared and is consumed by all three apps; backend type rules govern its TS shape
Web imports the registry for tab rendering + widget dispatch; frontend type rules govern that surface
New /config routes (registry/overrides/audit) live in apps/api; SQLite migration + Hono route conventions apply
getConfig() + 1.5s cache + stale-while-revalidate live in runner; coordinator/skill spec call sites are migrated to async config reads
New #settings route + 3-tab settings UI + textarea/array editor widgets live in apps/web/src/main.ts
